LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBRARYS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DID NOT OPPOSE DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, ON THE GROUND THAT THE COUNT FAILS TO STATE A STATUTORY BASIS FOR THE CLAIM. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER MELANIE GHENO, CSR NO. 7489; DEPT. 302. (302/RBU)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk MOlopernes; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Amy D. Super, of Office of the City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3800, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, AND SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC LIBRARYs' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff did not oppose Defendant's demurrer to the 11th cause of action. Defendant's demurrer to the 12th cause of action is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND, on the ground that the count fails to state a statutory basis for the claim. Order signed in open court. Judge Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Oct-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
